text:
Once upon a time, there was a curious goose named Gulliver. Every morning, Gulliver would waddle down to the lake to stretch her weary wings. She loved exploring the forest, and today, her eyes landed on a strange-looking rock.

After a bit of investigation, she discovered it was an ancient artifact. It glowed strangely, so she pecked it. Suddenly, Gulliver could hear conversations all around her. Birds were chatting about the weather, squirrels gossiping about who might find a nut tonight, and a distant group murmured about the stars.

One bird friend piped up, "You know, Gulliver, there's something else we're curious about. There's talk about a big, shining feathered creature that floats in the sky from time to time."

Gulliver pondered this. It sounded exciting. She squawked excitedly, "Oh? Could it fly us there? Watch me!"

With a flap of her wings
